global_notes: This editor cuts fast and purposefully — 21 beats across 24.6 seconds averages just over a second per clip, with aggressive trimming (11 trimmed vs 3 added) that keeps the pace kinetic without feeling choppy. The front camera dominates as the workhorse angle, while overhead shots are reserved for specific visual payoffs (the beauty open bowl, likely key texture moments), rather than used interchangeably. The work is organized into tight thematic clusters — a 3-shot beauty open, a transformation arc for the toast, a punctuated processor sequence with a flash cut — suggesting an editor who thinks in mini-sequences rather than individual clips, building rhythm through grouping. The most telling choice is dropping the final 5 pipeline beats entirely: this editor trusts the closing blend sequence to land the ending and resists padding, preferring a clean out over completeness.
